domain: SaaS billing and subscription management platform. Customers sign up for plans, make payments, manage subscriptions, and view invoices.

personas.name: growth-startup
personas.description: A fast-growing startup with 50 customers across 3 pricing tiers (starter, pro, enterprise). Mix of monthly and annual subscriptions, some past-due invoices, recent upgrades and downgrades. 6 months of billing history with increasing MRR.

personas.name: established-saas
personas.description: A mature SaaS company with 75 customers, low churn, mostly enterprise annual contracts. Clean billing history, some refunds, dunning management. 6 months of data.
